message:
test(conformance): add errno_ops fixture test coverage

Add fixture-based test for errno_ops.json (23 cases):
- __errno_location, strerror, strerror_r, strerror_l, perror
- errno_constants, errno_preservation
- Handles mode=both by running strict and hardened variants
- Skips cases without expected_output (e.g., strerror_r_null_buffer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
